notable_excerpts: The second impact is the one-time exceptional charge of INR 265 crores that we have taken towards increasing gradually liability on account of the new labor code released by the Government of India on 21st November.
Full-time employees stood at 69,000, virtually 70,000, including all the three companies.

Firstly, to enhance balance sheet resilience amidst a volatile global economic environment, the company has further strengthened its provisioning framework by implementing a minimum loss given default floor across all lines of our businesses.
And as the Board and committee approved the change, I think they were also very clear in communication that we should make permanent change and continue to follow it on a go-forward basis.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call focused heavily on governance aspects, particularly around risk management and provisioning frameworks. Social aspects were touched upon with mentions of labor code compliance and employee numbers. There was a lack of environmental content.
strengths: Strong governance focus with detailed provisioning framework
Proactive compliance with new labor codes
weaknesses: Lack of environmental initiatives or disclosures
